title: 8 Pcs Self Adhesive Cork Board Cork Sheet 2 mm Thick 30x21cm Corks Tiles Mat for Coasters Wall Decoration DIY Crafts Bulletin Board for Office, Home, School
features: 【Premium Material】These A4 cork sheets are made from high-quality, renewable natural cork with a soft yet extremely stable surface. Thanks to their non-slip and wear-resistant properties, they are ideal for pinboards, coasters, or creative wall decorations. The sturdy sheets are resistant to breakage and reusable - perfect for homes, offices, or cafés.

【Easy to Use】The strong adhesive backing allows for easy application on smooth surfaces such as glass, tiles, or walls. Simply remove the protective film and stick - no additional tools required. The high-tack coating leaves no residue behind.

【Perfect for DIY Projects】The cork sheets can be easily cut and customised to suit your needs. Whether for festive decorations, photo displays, or pinboards - the strong self-adhesive backing makes them ready to use immediately. Their flexible handling makes them an ideal material for all craft and DIY projects.

【Versatile Applications】These self-adhesive cork sheets are suitable for pinboards, coasters, wall decorations, or creative projects. The soft surface allows for easy attachment of notes and photos. Ideal for homes, schools, offices, or commercial use - the possibilities are endless.

【Practical 8-Piece Set】The set includes 8 cork sheets (30x21 cm, 2 mm thick) - plenty of material for various projects. The thin yet sturdy sheets are both lightweight and durable. Perfect for crafters seeking high-quality materials at an attractive price.
description: ✅ Durable & Non-Slip Designed for long-lasting use, these robust cork sheets resist wear while providing a reliable grip. Their resilient structure ensures they hold up well in high-traffic areas. ✅ Easy to Customise Effortlessly cut and shape these sheets to fit your creative vision. Ideal for a wide range of DIY projects, from personalised organisers to decorative accents. ✅ Writable Surface The smooth cork finish is perfect for jotting down notes, making these sheets a practical addition to offices, kitchens, or study spaces. ✅ Strong Self-Adhesive Backing Featuring a powerful peel-and-stick design, these sheets adhere firmly to smooth surfaces without leaving any messy residue. Ideal Uses: Great as pinboards, coasters, pot stands, or wall décor – suitable for offices, homes, schools, cafés, and bars. Specifications: Material: Premium Natural Cork Size: 21 x 30 cm (A4) Thickness: 2 mm Package Includes: 8 x Self-Adhesive Cork Sheets Please Note: 1. Colour variations may occur due to lighting and screen differences during photography. 2. A slight sizing discrepancy of 1-3 cm may exist due to manual measurement methods.
